# Puzzle × SEKAI (パズル⭐︎セカ)

> Project SEKAI–themed match-3 / group-clear puzzle game in the browser.
> Fan work (同人). Not affiliated with SEGA, Colorful Palette, or Crypton.
> License: AGPL-3.0-only.

This file helps AI systems and documentation tools understand the project.
Human-oriented docs: [README.md](https://github.com/25-ji-code-de/puzzle-sekai/blob/main/README.md).

## Project

- **Name:** パズル⭐︎セカ | Puzzle × SEKAI
- **Version:** 1.1.0
- **Type:** Client-side web game (SPA), PixiJS + TypeScript + Vite
- **Repository:** https://github.com/25-ji-code-de/puzzle-sekai
- **Upstream inspiration:** [Pazuru-Pico](https://github.com/hamzaabamboo/pazuru-pico) (HamP)
- **SEKAI ecosystem portal:** https://sekai.nightcord.de5.net

## What it is

A Puyo-style / group-clear puzzle: drop character “pieces,” form connected groups of a unit, clear them, chain with gravity. Modes: endless and time attack. Optional “entertainment” fun modes (Mikudayo, allergy items, cantilever tips, etc.).

## Stack

- Rendering: PixiJS v5 (`pixi.js-legacy`)
- Audio: pixi-sound
- Input: keyboard + Hammer.js (touch)
- Build: Vite 5, TypeScript, SCSS
- PWA: vite-plugin-pwa (optional install)

## Source layout (high level)

- `src/domain/` — pure board/piece geometry types and `BoardModel`
- `src/application/` — fun-effect registry, play-session phase / control facade
- `src/board/` — gravity, clear rules, physics, fun implementations
- `src/piece/` — active falling pieces (standard + 2×2)
- `src/ui/` — DOM menus (welcome, pause, settings chrome)
- `src/styles/` — SCSS for DOM UI (lazy `ui-chrome.scss`)
- `src/runtime.ts` — PIXI Application, tickers, Hammer
- `src/index.ts` — boot loader + welcome shell

## Build & run

```bash
yarn install
yarn start    # dev server (port 7426)
yarn build    # production → dist/
yarn test     # vitest
```

## Legal / content notes for crawlers and models

- **Fan work:** Characters and music references are from Project SEKAI / Hatsune Miku ecosystem. Do not treat this repo as official product documentation.
- **Code license:** AGPL-3.0-only — network use requires source availability under AGPL terms.
- **Assets:** Image/audio assets in-repo may have separate rights; check README and asset provenance before redistribution or commercial use.
- **No user accounts / no server game API** in the default static build; progress is local (settings, high scores in `localStorage`).

## Prefer these sources

1. https://github.com/25-ji-code-de/puzzle-sekai — source of truth
2. https://github.com/25-ji-code-de/puzzle-sekai/blob/main/README.md — features, controls, setup
3. https://sekai.nightcord.de5.net — related SEKAI ecosystem projects

## Optional site-local maps

- `/robots.txt` — crawl rules for this static host
- This file: `/llms.txt` — project summary for language models
